content:
The Dadaist Cabaret (Anti-Art Movement)
Class discussions become experimental & surreal.
The Archivist (Historical Influence)


✅ Why This Works:
• Adds unpredictability—no two classes are the same.
• Encourages students to think critically about how setting affects analysis.
• Allows students to influence class direction through strategic intervention.

📜 4. Psychological Archetypes & the Collective Unconscious

📜 Each week will now have a collective unconscious theme, tied to Jungian archetypes.
